token_id_dtype_rule: After tokenizer/model config are available, set dtype once from vocab_size (and tokenizer len): uint16 if vocab_size <= 65535, else uint32.

bigram_counts.merge_strategy: Stream all corpus shards sequentially; per-chunk np.unique(keys, return_counts=True); merge run artifacts into one sparse table (parquet or npz).

window_scoring.notes: Rough empirical rarity over the corpus; do not engineer for unseen transitions.

corpus_processing.behavior: Run over the entire Dolma v1_6-sample; process and merge all shards in order. No random seeks over raw corpus.

token_shards.notes: Shard size flexible; keep sequential layout under data/tokens/.

selection.notes: Two-axis: rarity bin + per-shard cap so one gzip shard cannot dominate.
